name: French Silk Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled (or pre-melted baking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until completely smooth.
2. Gradually add the melted chocolate and vanilla to the mixture.
3. Beat in each egg one at a time, ensuring to beat for five minutes after each addition.
4. Pour the batter into a cooled nine-inch pie shell.
5. Chill the pie.
6. Decorate with whipped cream before serving.
Note: Please check local regulations regarding the use of raw eggs in dishes that are not cooked before consuming this pie. In New York State, it is considered safe to do so.
